name: himalaya-skills
description: Read, search, organize and compose email from the terminal via the himalaya CLI (IMAP/SMTP).

plugins.name: himalaya-skills
plugins.description: Drive himalaya (CLI email client over IMAP/SMTP): list/search/read/move/flag, attachments, compose with MML (HTML, inline images, attachments). Includes account setup for Gmail, iCloud, Outlook, Yahoo and OAuth2 — with a Yahoo throttling warning.
